ourState:
Two parallel, HONEST shape-only TEE stacks, plus a real PII engine and a real distillation trainer that are NOT joined on the privacy-critical path.

ATTESTATION (two systems, neither does crypto-chain verify):
- packages/attestation/src/index.js dispatches per-target binary/JSON parsers. sev-snp.js:54-83 is a REAL 1184-byte AMD SNP struct parser (extracts measurement at offset 168, signature at 672) but explicitly defers VCEK verification (sev-snp.js:36-39, signing_cert_chain:null). gcp-cvm.js wraps sev-snp/tdx. index.js:13 states "Cryptographic verification of the vendor signing chain is stubbed"; TOFU is the documented model (index.js:17-21).
- src/confidential-compute.js is the richer system: shape validators per kind incl. NVIDIA NRAS (KINDS.NRAS line 57; REPORT_SHAPES NRAS line 104), pluggable registerVerifier/registerAttestationVerifier, fail-closed verified:false unless a tenant registers a crypto verifier (verifyConfidentialCompute:376-411). NO default crypto verifier ships. fakeVerifier exists for tests only (343-345).
- GAP: BYOC recordAttestation (src/byoc.js:86-131) calls the packages/attestation parser, NOT confidential-compute.js. So GPU-TEE/NRAS shape-checking and the pluggable crypto interface are never exercised by the live BYOC enrollment path. byoc.js has zero confidential-compute imports (grep clean). No tests/*byoc* file exists.

BYOC (src/byoc.js): REAL deploy-manifest issuance + HMAC signing (signManifest:30-35) + per-target deploy SCRIPTS for fly/aws-nitro/gcp-cvm/azure-cvm/docker (deployScriptFor:146-407). These are TEMPLATES the operator runs; kolm never executes them. The gcp/azure scripts use generic n2d-standard/DC2as CPU CVMs (byoc.js:312 n2d-standard-2, :362 Standard_DC2as_v5) - NO GPU and NO NVIDIA CC flag anywhere in the generated scripts. So 'optional confidential GPU for the distill workload' is not generated.

AIR-GAP DISTILL (src/airgap-distill.js): offlineDistill (216-293) does REAL air-gap guards: no KOLM_TEACHER_API_KEY (80-89), all-paths-local+absolute+exist (94-118), live no-network dial probe to example.com w/ 50ms timeout (129-164). But it ONLY writes a queued spec to ~/.kolm/airgap-distill-runs/<id>.json (persistQueuedRun:189-197). STUB on the training side: NO worker consumes that queue - grep for 'airgap-distill-runs' across apps/ returns nothing; the trainer (apps/trainer/distill.py) is invoked by a different path. So an air-gap run never actually trains.

LOCAL-TEACHER FENCE (src/airgap-teacher.js + airgap-mode.js): REAL and wired. verifyTeacherIsLocal (teacher.js:67-141) is a tight loopback/unix-socket allow-list; wrapFetch (mode.js:150-172) blocks non-loopback egress when KOLM_AIRGAP=1. airgap-routes.js:213 calls verifyTeacherIsLocal in the doctor path.

PII REDACTION (src/privacy-membrane.js): REAL, comprehensive, deterministic regex engine - 19 classes incl ssn/payment_card(Luhn)/api_key/private_key/jwt; redact()/redactWithPolicy() with per-class allow/redact/block/override policy + vault reinsertion (835-993). src/sensitive-data.js adds 11 secret shapes. WIRED to ingest FLAGGING (audit-ingest.js:179 scanSensitive). GAP: redaction is NOT applied to the distill training corpus - secure-training.js (classifyTrainingData:49-61) only CLASSIFIES (scan, not redact) to gate third-party-pod uploads; it never strips PII before training. gateway-receipt.js does no redaction (grep clean).

DIFFERENTIAL PRIVACY: src/dp-aggregation.js + privacy-membrane.differentialPrivacyStats are REAL Laplace mechanisms but ONLY for aggregate COUNT queries, and the noise is non-crypto Math.random, self-described as "research-quality, not a load-bearing privacy claim" (dp-aggregation.js:16-19). There is NO DP-SGD / Opacus / per-example gradient clipping in the actual fine-tune: grep opacus|privacy_engine|noise_multiplier across apps/ hits only one comment in federated.py. The student trainer (distill.py) is a REAL torch+transformers KD trainer (imports at 1332-1375, train() at 1122) with no DP path.
frontierState:
SOTA as of June 2026 (from tf16-confidential-compute-distill-privacy.json):
- GPU TEE / confidential GPUs are GA: NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU TEE GA ~May 2025, H200 production; protected VRAM + PCIe encryption + on-die root of trust, multi-GPU (8xH100/H200). Azure CVMs w/ H100 (NCCadsH100v5, SEV-SNP+H100) GA Sept 2024; GCP A3 confidential VMs w/ H100. Attestation: NVIDIA NRAS, composable with Intel TDX/AMD SEV-SNP host attestation (Intel+NVIDIA seamless-attestation, 2025). Overhead 4-8% throughput, <5% with CUDA graphs/large batch; worse (20-30% latency) only on frequent model swap. (cites: techcommunity.microsoft.com Azure H100 CVM GA; computer.org IISWC 2025 overhead study; phala.com Confidential-LLMs; learn.microsoft.com gpu-options).
- DP fine-tuning matured: DP-SGD + PEFT/LoRA practical; user-level DP (research.google blog 2025), defenses vs MIA/extraction, eps-selection guidance (arXiv:2504.21036 v2, 2025-04; ICLR 2022 DP-LM fine-tuning openreview Q42f0dfjECO).
- PII redaction pipelines production-grade in gateway or app layer; benchmark precision/recall on representative traffic; hybrid rule+ML (philterd.ai; truefoundry.com LLM-gateway-vs-application).
- Strongest 2026 posture for a proxy-and-distill platform = mandatory redaction at proxy + strong tenant fencing/per-tenant keys + OPTIONAL confidential-GPU (H100/H200 CC) execution of the distill job with attestation. Must disclaim: redaction has false negatives; distilled models leak via inversion/MIA/extraction even under DP; the proxy observes redacted content; TEEs don't kill side-channels/impl bugs; attestation verifies the TEE not app logic.
alreadyFrontier: Tenant fencing + 'sensitive data never crosses the boundary' gate: secure-training.js assertPodEligible blocks (sensitive-data, third-party-pod) pairs before any upload, with LOCAL/THIRD_PARTY backend partition and encrypt-at-rest + wipe-on-teardown policy declaration (secure-training.js:21-70) - matches the frontier 'tenant fencing' pillar.

Local-only teacher enforcement: verifyTeacherIsLocal tight loopback/unix allow-list + wrapFetch egress block under KOLM_AIRGAP=1 is exactly the 'data stays local / no upstream leak' architecture (airgap-teacher.js, airgap-mode.js).

Production-grade PII redaction engine exists: 19 PII classes + 11 secret shapes, Luhn-checked PANs, policy engine (allow/redact/block/override), vault reinsertion, detector-coverage caveat for bounded claims (privacy-membrane.js, sensitive-data.js) - frontier-quality detector breadth.

HONEST attestation posture: confidential-compute.js fail-closed verified:false without a registered crypto verifier, explicit verifier:'shape_v1' markers, NRAS/PCCS/SNP/Nitro shapes documented - aligns with the frontier disclaimer 'attestation verifies TEE not app logic' and avoids overclaiming.

Real distillation trainer (apps/trainer/distill.py) implements token-level + sequence-level KD with correct references (Hinton, MiniLLM reverse-KL, on-policy) - the distill capability itself is genuine, not mocked.

Detector-coverage bounded-claim discipline (sensitive-data.detectorCoverage) and MIA-resistance verifier contract (federated-mia.js) match the frontier 'must honestly disclaim residual leakage' requirement.

gaps.gap: Redaction is NOT applied to the distill training corpus. secure-training.classifyTrainingData only CLASSIFIES (scan) to gate uploads; no code calls redact()/redactWithPolicy() on training rows before distill.py trains. The frontier's #1 pillar for a proxy-and-distill platform is 'mandatory PII redaction at the proxy before any training'. We detect+flag+block but never strip.

Air-gap distillation is queue-only: offlineDistill writes ~/.kolm/airgap-distill-runs/<id>.json but no worker consumes it (grep 'airgap-distill-runs' across apps/ = 0 hits). The advertised offline distill is not end-to-end - status stays 'queued' forever.

No confidential-GPU execution path. BYOC gcp/azure deploy scripts provision CPU CVMs (n2d-standard-2, DC2as_v5) with no GPU and no NVIDIA CC flag. The frontier 'optional confidential GPU (H100/H200 CC) for the distill workload with NRAS attestation' is absent from generated infra.

GPU-TEE / NRAS attestation is defined (confidential-compute.js) but orphaned: BYOC recordAttestation uses packages/attestation (CPU TEE parsers only), never confidential-compute.js, so NRAS shape-checking and the pluggable crypto-verifier interface are never invoked on the live enrollment path.

No DP-SGD in the actual fine-tune. DP is count-aggregation only (Laplace over already-aggregated stats) using non-crypto Math.random; distill.py has no per-example gradient clipping / noise_multiplier / Opacus. Frontier DP-fine-tuning (DP-SGD+LoRA, user-level DP) is not offered for the student trainer.

No crypto-chain attestation verification anywhere (VCEK/ARK-ASK, Intel PCS, Nitro KMS, NRAS service). Both stacks are shape/TOFU only. Acceptable today and honestly disclaimed, but it caps the 'attested confidential compute' claim.
No BYOC test coverage (tests/*byoc* absent) despite byoc.js issuing HMAC-signed manifests and parsing operator-supplied attestations - a security-sensitive surface.
